metadata.description: AI-powered data services skills for music, image, video generation, web search, and more

plugins.name: acedatacloud-ai-media
plugins.description: AI media generation: music (Suno, Producer, Fish Audio), images (Flux, Seedream, NanoBanana), video (Luma, Sora, Veo, Kling, Grok, Hailuo, Happy Horse, Seedance, Maestro)

plugins.name: acedatacloud-ai-tools
plugins.description: AI utility skills: LLM chat, web and Telegram research, face transform, short URLs, HTML→single-page PDF, Apple Notes (macOS), API guide, account management

plugins.name: acedatacloud-content
plugins.description: Connected content platforms: read, search, publish, and interact through user-authorized accounts
